questions.question: What number should replace the question mark? 70 & 91 & 120 , 14 & 13 & 24 , 5 & 7 & ?
What is an exception in OOP?

answers.A2: An event that disrupts normal program flow, handled through try-catch blocks

questions.key: An event that disrupts normal program flow, handled through try-catch blocks
questions.justification: Exceptions are runtime errors that can be thrown and caught, allowing structured error handling.

questions.question: What is a const member function?

answers.A1: A function that cannot be called
answers.A2: A function that cannot modify member variables
answers.A4: A function that must be inlined

questions.key: A function that cannot modify member variables
questions.justification: A const member function promises not to modify any member variables of the object, ensuring data integrity.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a move constructor?

answers.A1: To move an object to a different location in memory
answers.A2: To create an object by moving resources from a temporary object
answers.A3: To change the position of member variables

questions.key: To create an object by moving resources from a temporary object
questions.justification: A move constructor efficiently transfers resources from a temporary (rvalue) object, improving performance by avoiding unnecessary copies.
